final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style news/editorial photograph for a 微博 trending post, wide horizontal format.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide horizontal with generous negative space for text overlay; skyline as primary horizontal subject
Subject: must include a city dusk skyline with neon lights beginning to glow, hurrying pedestrians in the foreground, and distant skyscrapers reflecting the last sunlight
Scene/backdrop: must include an urban 黄昏 scene — neon-lit streets, crowded sidewalks, high-rise buildings catching sunset glow
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic dusk atmosphere with high contrast between warm golden sunset reflections and cool emerging neon — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction of warm amber/gold sunset against cool neon blues and purples — exact ratios and values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution 8K-texture documentary feel — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, primary, bold headline font, prominent position), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (medium, secondary subtitle), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small, watermark, bottom-right or bottom area)
Constraints: must preserve strict 16:9 horizontal framing; layout must leave sufficient clear space for text overlays to remain legible
Avoid:
